results.title: Mercedes-AMG E 53 PHEV India Launch on July 23 With Over 100km EV Range
results.description: Mercedes-Benz is set to introduce the AMG E 53 HYBRID 4MATIC+ in India on July 23, reviving the E 53 sedan with a plug-in hybrid system offering over 100km of electric-only range.

results.title: ABVP seeks NIA probe into Indian medical student’s death in Uzbekistan over conversion allegations
results.description: ABVP seeks an NIA probe into the death of Indian medical student Savariya Basant in Uzbekistan. The organisation alleges religious conversion pressure and demands a comprehensive investigation.

results.title: States, UTs to deliberate on irrigation reforms, dam safety and water conservation at Delhi meet
results.description: Ministry of Jal Shakti, Water Resources Departments

results.title: PRANAB DOLEY ARRESTED
results.description: গুৱাহাটীৰ পৰা গ্ৰেপ্তাৰ ভূমি ৰক্ষা আন্দোলনৰ সক্ৰিয় নেতা প্ৰণৱ দলেক ৷ তেওঁৰ গ্রেপ্তাৰ অগণতান্ত্রিক আৰু স্বৈৰাচাৰী আখ্যা দল সংগঠনৰ ৷

results.title: Man, horse drown as cart sinks in flooded railway underpass in UP’s Meerut
results.description: A dairy worker and his horse drowned in a flooded railway underpass in Uttar Pradesh after ignoring warnings and driving into deep water.

results.title: England seal 4-0 series wweep with 56-run victory over India in fifth T20I
results.description: Powered by Jos Buttler's marauding hundred, England defeated India by 56 runs in the fifth and final T20I to sweep the five-match series 4-0 here on Saturday.

results.title: When will CBSE release Class 10 second board exam result 2026? Here's what we know so far
results.description: The CBSE Class 10 second board exam results for 2026 are anticipated shortly. Students can access their marks on official CBSE websites after the announcement. A minimum of 33% in each subject is required for passing the examinations. The board will apply a best-of-two policy for final score calculation. Students need specific details like roll number to view their results.

results.title: Operation of India’s first Hydrogen-powered train soon
results.description: New Delhi, July 12: India’s first Hydrogen-powered train is expected to be rolled out soon for commercial operations, marking a major step towards green and sustainable transportation. Indian Railways has approved the introduction of a 10-car Hydrogen Fuel Cell-based trainset on the dedicated Jind-Sonipat section of Northern Railway and the launch date is expected to [...] The post Operation of India’s first Hydrogen-powered train soon appeared first on Business Vibes of India (BVI) .
